violations.text: The 3 Bay Sink Faucet was observed to be leaking when hot and cold water controls are turned off. Plumbing system and fixtures are to be maintained good repair. Maintenance Technician was notified at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of biofilm. Surfaces were properly cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The lowboy unit was observed not closing properly. PIC stated unit has had gasket replaced recently. Unit to be adjusted to properly close. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of bio-film. PIC stated establishment normally cleans ice machine once every two weeks. PIC to ensure establishment maintains that cleaning schedule. Ice machine to be cleaned by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
